$comment: Sponsor / difficulty select — the Oregon Trail profession analog. Each sponsor sets the provisioning budget (starting Credits) and a terminal score multiplier (less funding = harder = higher score). Interpreted by the sponsor-select screen + scoring.

roster.name: UNOMA Mandate
roster.blurb: A fully-funded UN Mars Authority expedition. Generous provisioning, modest acclaim.

roster.name: Corporate Consortium
roster.blurb: A resource-extraction syndicate. Lean budget, sharper stakes — a respected run.

roster.name: Independent Settlers
roster.blurb: A shoestring colonist co-op. Scarce funds, everything to prove — the legend run.
